arts.sum: A host of Premier League clubs are circling around Wolves star Matheus Cunha, who has emerged as one of the most in-demand attackers ahead of the summer transfer window. Despite Wolves’ inconsistencies this season, the Brazilian forward has been in sensational form, registering 15 goals and 4 assists in 29 appearances across all competitions. arts.ttl: Eight players may miss Wolves vs Tottenham after Ange Postecoglou injury update
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will still be without Dejan Kulusevski and Kevin Danso when they play Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League this weekend. September saw Yerson Mosquera become another to sustain the season-ending blow while playing against Aston Villa in their fifth Premier League match this term.

arts.ttl: Tottenham early team news hints for Wolves as Ange Postecoglou set for major changes
arts.sum: The club featured photos of Maddison and Solanke in their matchday graphic posted across social media channels on Sunday morning. Tottenham Hotspur have hinted at the involvement of Dominic Solanke and James Maddison against Wolverhampton Wanderers despite Ange Postecoglou acknowledging that there will be rotation for the Premier League match.
